content.query:
create view v_AR_Aging_Historical
--drop view v_AR_Aging_Historical
as
--select sum(Amount) from v_AR_Aging_Historical

SELECT      A.Amount, B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           SUM(CUAM*ARAT) as Amount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE         /*RECO <> '9'
AND         */[ACDT] <= '2024-11-30'
GROUP BY    CUNO, CINO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT CASE WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'GWT%' then 'International'
            WHEN LEFT(OC.CUNO,1) in ('5', '7') then 'Consumer'
            end as Division
,           CASE WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE '7%' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE '5%' then 'Compact' 
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'GWT%' then 'International'
            end as [Business Unit]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           IVDT as [Invoice Date]
,           DUDT as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FS.IVDT, FS.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FS
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on FS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FS.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       FS.TRCD = '10'
AND         FS.RECO <> '9'
) B         ON A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number] and A.[Customer Number] = B.[Customer Number]
